  "findings": [
    "Free conductor length at the outlet/junction box is less than 6 inches, violating minimum length requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-pull conductors to provide at least 6 inches of free conductor measured from the point of entry, or splice on extensions if permitted by engineering specifications."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 300.14 requires at least 6 inches of free conductor measured from the point of entry to the box for splices or connection of devices. The observed condition of <6 in. free conductor is a direct violation of this requirement.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.14"
  ]
